raw_text:
46. Injection Molding Tooling Eng ineer

Job Summary  
Handles tooling for injection molding operations, ensuring high -quality plastic component 
production.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Manage injection mold tooling  
• Support mold trials and process setup  
• Troubleshoot molding defects  
• Optimize cycle time and tool performance  
• Coordinate with design and production teams  
• Maintain tooling documentation  
Required Skills  
• Injection molding process knowledge  
• Mold design and maintenance expertise  
• Problem -solving and analytical skills  
• Understanding of plas tics materials  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Plastics  
Experience  
• 3–7 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹35,000 – ₹75,000 per month
